name: ReversingLabs YARA Rules
description: Professional-grade rules built by ReversingLabs threat analysts, tested against 10B+ binaries with zero-false-positive guarantee. Covers ransomware, trojans, infostealers, exploits, and viruses.

name: Trellix ATR YARA Rules
